meaning: n.焚化装置,焚化炉,焚尸炉
examples: A refuse incinerator commissioned in 1993 used to contribute heat to help run the desalination system.
Then a giant incinerator in space would burn the garbage.
Deodorization of sewage treatment plant incinerator flue gas.
The incinerator will be built near the Seabank Power Station and the former Terra Nitrogen Works.
Plans for an energy from waste incinerator at a quarry near Dartmoor have been rejected.
